response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer and his diverse technical background align well with the fullstack role, particularly in TypeScript, React, and Node.js. His work on scalable platforms, REST APIs, and relational databases (though primarily MongoDB) demonstrates practical expertise. While his experience leans more toward senior-level roles, his adaptability and passion for clean architecture suggest strong potential for growth into a mid-level position. The high on-site presence requirement may be a consideration given his remote-friendly roles.
strengths: Strong fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven scalability and performance optimization skills in high-traffic systems
Diverse technical background with expertise in relational databases, Docker, and Kubernetes
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role (10+ years of senior experience)
Potential mismatch with high on-site presence requirement due to remote-friendly roles
